林柏特：對華倫西亞是一場不能輸的比賽；奧度爾無法出戰

在對陣華倫西亞的賽前發佈會上，藍軍主帥林柏特表示這是一場不能輸的比賽，否則情況就會很困難。同時他也表示對巴克利的支持。

“我認為這是一場不能輸的比賽。首回合我們失利，如果再輸我們的情況就很困難。”

｜晉級歐聯淘汰賽階段

“歐聯是歐洲足球中水平最高的賽事。它擁有巨大的聲望。我非常喜歡參加歐聯，我們當然希望參加這個賽事(歐冠淘汰賽階段)。”

｜關於巴克利的場外醜聞

“我支持他。他表現得有些缺乏職業素養。但我不認為他做得那麼糟糕。他有傷，必須專注於復出。我喜歡他。”

｜關於對手華倫西亞

“我對華倫西亞關注了很多，我認為這是一支穩定的隊伍。在這裏踢波不僅要面對這支球隊，還有這座球場，這裏的球迷和氣氛。”

｜關於球員傷勢

“奧度爾無法出戰，希望能趕得上週末的比賽。魯迪加目前只做健身練習，所以還需要一段時間。”

消息參考來源: football.london

Ethan Ampadu's first three months at RB Leipzig have yielded only two substitute appearances (Nov, 8) and #CFC don’t have the option to recall him in January.

@SJohnsonSport & @liam_twomey
on when the 19-year-old may get his chance to impress.
https://theathletic.com/1358617/2019/11/08/ampadu/?source=shared-article

While Ampadu has been struggling for game time, the player has never let his frustration show to the coaching staff or any of his new team-mates. The attitude on show is that of someone driven to succeed. An insider from within the RB Leipzig camp has informed The Athletic how the former Exeter City trainee has impressed with his work ethic in training, talent and being so strong in the tackle.

Chelsea will be encouraged to know that despite living abroad for such a short time, he has become a popular figure in the dressing room. He has started to learn a bit of German, which has been received well.

It is understood that one of the issues Nagelsmann has had over Ampadu is the quality of his passing, particularly if employed in midfield. This may come as a surprise to some readers given how comfortable he’s appeared to be on the ball when playing for Wales or Chelsea. But he has made more of an impact in training lately, which is why he was finally rewarded with a couple of appearances as a substitute. Nagelsmann likes his aggression and willingness to learn from the others.
